rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type annexes for interface behavior and implementation annexes for subcomponent bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees for component ports must be scoped to the component type unless they refer to implementation-specific details.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
Ensure AGREE expressions use only declared variables and types from the AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Constants, equations, assumptions, and guarantees must be declared in valid AADL scopes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes or using subcomponent ports in type contracts.
Do not assume numeric types for Boolean or event ports without explicit model support.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
